productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Take formal dressing to the next level with this leather loafer from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish, while the slip-on style makes it a fabulous easy wear formal shoe.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearElastic gores on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitFabric inner lining on the forefoot region for ultimate breathabilityMidsoleErgonomically curved and padded footbed with a leather lining and perforations for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured waffle pattern lugs on the medial side and horizontal grooves on the lateral side, and has pivot points on the big toe mound and lateral back heel for absolute grip and traction, and easy movement of the foot Shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
